title: Chief of State (disambiguation)
content:
'''Chief of State''' may refer to:
__NOTOC__
==[[Canon]]==
===Organizations and titles===
*[[Chancellor (Rebel Alliance)|'''Chancellor''']], also known as '''Chief of State''', the civilian leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Events===
*'''[[First Galactic Alliance Chief of State election (44 ABY)|First Galactic Alliance Chief of State election]]''', which saw the election of [[Padnel Ovin]] as interim Chief of State of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]
*'''[[Second Galactic Alliance Chief of State election (44 ABY)|Second Galactic Alliance Chief of State election]]''', which saw the election of [[Rokari Kem]] as interim Chief of State of the Galactic Alliance

===Locations===
*'''[[Chief of State's Briefing Office]]''', a room on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] used by the Chief of State of the Galactic Alliance
*'''[[Chief of State's Suite]]''', a location in the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on Coruscant used by the Chief of State of the Galactic Alliance
*'''[[Chief of State's office]]''', a room in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on Coruscant used by the Chief of State of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Chief of State's quarters]]''', a location in the Imperial Palace on Coruscant used by the Chief of State of the New Republic

===Organizations and titles===
*'''[[Chief of State (Alliance)/Legends|Chief of State]]''', the leader of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Chief of State (Corellia)|Chief of State]]''', the leader of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*'''[[Chief of State (Dac)|Chief of State]]''', the leader of the [[Mon Calamari Council|Dac Council]]
*'''[[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]]''', the leader of the Galactic Alliance
*'''[[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]]''', the leader of the New Republic
*'''[[Office of the Chief of State]]''', the executive branch of the Galactic Alliance

==See also==
*[[Chief (disambiguation)]]
